name: Milk Chocolate Bar

pros.title: context matters more than purity here
pros.explanation: This category is mostly about tradeoffs and use case.

pros.title: can sometimes be a better swap
pros.explanation: Replacement value matters in misc more than in cleaner categories.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
